all.en: Open enrollment for the new benefits plan year begins on November first.
all.zh: 新福利計畫年度的公開加保自十一月一日開始。

all.en: All employees must review their elections before the deadline of November twentieth.
all.zh: 所有員工必須在十一月二十日截止前檢視個人選擇。

all.en: This guide explains the major options available across health and wellness plans.
all.zh: 本指南說明健康與身心福祉計畫提供的主要選項。

all.en: Medical coverage now includes three tiers with different deductible and premium levels.
all.zh: 醫療保障現提供三種等級，自負額與保費各不相同。

all.en: The basic tier offers low premiums and higher out of pocket maximums.
all.zh: 基本等級保費較低，自付上限較高。

all.en: The premium tier covers most specialist visits with very small copayments.
all.zh: 尊榮等級對多數專科門診僅收取極低的部分負擔。

all.en: Dental and vision plans remain optional and may be added independently.
all.zh: 牙科與眼科計畫仍為自由選擇，可獨立加保。

all.en: Flexible spending accounts allow pretax savings for healthcare and dependent care.
all.zh: 彈性支出帳戶可將稅前金額存入，支付醫療與扶養照護。

all.en: Annual contribution limits have been raised in line with new federal guidelines.
all.zh: 年度提撥上限已依新版聯邦規範向上調整。

all.en: Retirement savings matching has increased from four percent to five percent.
all.zh: 退休儲蓄相對提撥比例已自百分之四提高至百分之五。

all.en: Employees should review beneficiary designations during this enrollment window.
all.zh: 員工應於本次加保期間檢視受益人指定資料。

all.en: Life insurance coverage remains available at one or two times annual salary.
all.zh: 壽險保障維持一倍或兩倍年薪兩種額度可選。

all.en: Supplemental disability insurance can be purchased at group discounted rates.
all.zh: 附加失能保險可依團體折扣費率投保。

all.en: A new mental health support program has been added at no employee cost.
all.zh: 新增的身心健康支持方案不向員工收取任何費用。

all.en: Wellness rewards continue to provide gift cards for completing annual screenings.
all.zh: 健康獎勵方案持續提供完成年度健檢的禮券回饋。

all.en: Decision support tools are available on the internal benefits portal.
all.zh: 內部福利入口網提供決策輔助工具供員工使用。

all.en: Employees may compare side by side costs based on personal usage patterns.
all.zh: 員工可依個人使用情境，並列比較各方案成本。

all.en: Virtual information sessions will run every Tuesday and Thursday this month.
all.zh: 線上說明會本月每週二與週四舉行。

all.en: Recorded versions will remain available on demand for thirty days.
all.zh: 錄影版本將以隨選方式保留三十天供觀看。

all.en: Failure to complete elections will result in default coverage at last year levels.
all.zh: 未完成選擇者將以去年方案作為預設保障。

all.en: Changes outside this window require a qualifying life event to take effect.
all.zh: 本期間以外的異動需具備合格生活事件方可生效。

all.en: Human resources representatives are available for one on one consultations.
all.zh: 人力資源同仁可提供一對一諮詢服務。

all.en: Please contact the benefits team early if you require translation support.
all.zh: 如需翻譯協助，請及早聯繫福利團隊。

all.en: We encourage every employee to choose coverage that fits their personal needs.
all.zh: 鼓勵每位員工選擇最符合個人需求的保障方案。

all.en: Spousal and dependent coverage requires submission of supporting documentation.
all.zh: 配偶與眷屬保障須繳交相關佐證文件。

all.en: All documents can be uploaded securely through the benefits portal dashboard.
all.zh: 所有文件均可透過福利入口網儀表板安全上傳。

all.en: A dedicated hotline operates from eight in the morning until six in the evening.
all.zh: 專屬客服專線於上午八點至下午六點開放服務。

all.en: Frequently asked questions have been compiled into a downloadable reference sheet.
all.zh: 常見問題已彙整成可下載的參考文件。

all.en: Employees relocating overseas should consult the international benefits team.
all.zh: 外派至海外的員工請洽國際福利團隊。

all.en: Voluntary benefits such as pet insurance and legal services are also offered.
all.zh: 另提供寵物保險、法律服務等自願性福利。

all.en: Premium deductions will appear on the first paycheck of the new plan year.
all.zh: 保費扣繳將於新計畫年度首張薪資單上呈現。

all.en: Confirmation statements will be mailed to your address of record in December.
all.zh: 確認通知書將於十二月寄送至您留存的地址。

all.en: Please review the statement and report any discrepancies within fifteen days.
all.zh: 請檢視通知書並於十五天內反映任何不符之處。

all.en: Thank you for taking the time to make informed decisions about your benefits.
all.zh: 感謝您撥冗為您的福利做出充分知情的選擇。

all.en: Health savings accounts now allow contributions of up to four thousand dollars annually.
all.zh: 健康儲蓄帳戶每年提撥上限現提高至四千美元。

all.en: Telemedicine visits remain free of charge under all medical plan tiers this year.
all.zh: 本年度所有醫療等級皆持續提供免費遠距醫療諮詢。

all.en: Vision plan members receive an annual eye exam without any copayment requirement.
all.zh: 眼科計畫成員可享每年一次免部分負擔的眼科檢查。

all.en: Dental plan coverage now includes orthodontic care for dependents under nineteen.
all.zh: 牙科計畫現納入十九歲以下眷屬的齒列矯正保障。

all.en: Adoption assistance benefits provide reimbursement of up to six thousand dollars.
all.zh: 收養補助福利最高可實報實銷六千美元。

all.en: Fertility support coverage has been expanded across all metropolitan service regions.
all.zh: 生育支持保障已擴及所有大都會服務區域。

all.en: Tuition reimbursement remains capped at five thousand dollars per calendar year.
all.zh: 學費補助維持每曆年上限五千美元。

all.en: Commuter benefits allow pretax deductions for transit passes and parking fees.
all.zh: 通勤福利可將大眾運輸票券與停車費以稅前金額扣繳。

all.en: Identity theft protection enrollment closes on the same date as medical elections.
all.zh: 身分盜用防護加保於醫療選擇截止同日結束受理。

all.en: Please verify your address before enrollment closes to avoid mailing delays later.
all.zh: 請於加保截止前確認地址，以免日後寄送延誤。

all.en: I switched to the higher tier this year because my kid started weekly physical therapy sessions.
all.zh: 今年我換到較高等級的方案，因為小孩開始每週去做物理治療。

all.en: Honestly, I almost forgot about open enrollment until my friend in HR sent me a reminder text.
all.zh: 老實說，要不是人資的朋友傳訊提醒我，我差點忘了加保期限。

all.en: Last year I overestimated my flexible spending account and lost a couple hundred dollars at year end.
all.zh: 去年我彈性支出帳戶存太多，年底還虧了幾百美元。

all.en: The mental health hotline came in handy when I was going through a rough patch at work.
all.zh: 工作低潮那陣子，身心健康專線真的派上用場。

all.en: I keep all my benefit confirmation emails in a dedicated folder so I can find them quickly later.
all.zh: 我把所有福利確認信都收在專門資料夾，之後要找比較快。

all.en: Did you know the wellness gift card can be used at most local grocery and pharmacy chains?
all.zh: 你知道健康獎勵的禮券大多數連鎖超市跟藥局都能用嗎？

all.en: I always compare the side by side cost estimator before clicking confirm on my final choices.
all.zh: 送出最終選擇前，我一定會先用並列比較工具看一遍預估費用。

all.en: Adding my partner to the dental plan turned out to be much cheaper than buying it on their own.
all.zh: 把另一半加進我的牙科方案，比他自己另外買便宜很多。

all.en: The pet insurance option saved me real money when my cat needed an emergency vet visit last winter.
all.zh: 去年冬天我家貓緊急看獸醫，寵物保險方案真的幫我省了不少錢。

all.en: If you have a baby on the way, schedule a one on one with HR to walk through your options.
all.zh: 如果家裡正在等寶寶報到，建議跟人資約個一對一把選項好好走一遍。
